task.title: Monitoring remote system resources
task.shortdesc: Use the Monitor action to view the contents and properties of remote objects and configure polling options to refresh remote objects every 5 - 200 seconds.

taskbody.context: You can open the Remote Monitor on a remote system, subsystem, filter, or other remote system container (such as a data set, an HFS folder, or JES job) to view details and status of the resource. You can use this view, for example, to monitor the status of submitted jobs.

step.cmd: To open the Remote Monitor, select an object in the Remote Systems view and click Monitor on the menu.
To configure polling options for an object, do these steps:

substep.cmd: Open the Remote Monitor on an object, such as My Jobs.
Click the arrow beside Poll Configuration.
Select the Poll checkbox and then move the Wait Interval slider bar to set the refresh interval for the Remote Monitor view.
substep.info: You can set a value of 5 - 200 seconds. The monitor updates the status of the object at the interval you set.

substep.cmd: To stop polling the object, clear the Poll check box.

taskbody.postreq: Monitoring and polling options are not saved from one session to another. After you disconnect from the remote system, the contents of the Remote Monitor and any polling options you set are cleared.
